message:
chore(beads): close ~40 FCP3 design beads via V3 spec verification cascade

Systematically verified FCP3 design beads against the 6824-line V3 spec,
confirming acceptance criteria met for kernel, architecture, host, ABI,
SDK, manifest, policy, placement, verification, and pilot beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
